text:
The latest product launches in global travel retail

ByJill SaylesinJust Landed,Liquor & WinesJuly 30, 2024Comments Offon Pernod Ricard GTR Martell Paris Exclusive Edition pays homage to 2024 Olympic Games

Part of the Martell Cordon Bleu City series, the edition is available exclusively with Lagardère Travel Retail at Paris airports and at Martell’s brand home in Cognac

Pernod Ricard Global Travel Retail (PRGTR)has introduced theMartell Paris Exclusive Editionto theMartell Cordon Bleu City series, which pays homage to the2024 Paris Olympic Gamestaking place from July to August.

Launching exclusively withLagardère Travel Retail, the new Paris edition will only be available atParis Charles de Gaulle Airport, Paris Orly Airportand at Martell’s brand home inCognac.

PRGTR research reveals that 54% of global travellers purchase duty free exclusives or unique products and limited editions are also a top luxury purchase trigger, making the new Martell Cordon Bleu Paris Exclusive Edition an ideal gift for a loved one or a distinctive and meaningful addition to a personal collection.

Following the successful launch of theHainanandSingapore Cityeditions released in 2023, Maison Martell has premiered its newest edition to the series with an intricate new packaging design, which celebrates the cultural icons and landmarks of Paris.



The new packaging design evokes the spirit and identity of Paris, marrying cityscape imagery with elements of Martell’s signature brand style, whilst paying homage to the 300-year heritage of the Maison. The boxes also feature a window, allowing consumers a preview of the bottle inside.

The Paris Olympic Games is expected to attract more than one million travellers, many of whom are looking for a special memento of their memories of the event.

Lagardère Travel Retail Director of Alcohol Supply & Purchasing, Victoire Gueugniercommented: “The 2024 Paris Olympics represents another historic landmark for France and for its capital, which is so beautifully captured by theMartell Paris Exclusive Edition. We are delighted to partner withPernod Ricard Global Travel Retailto offer this bespoke gifting proposition, worthy of such a momentous occasion and look forward to welcoming travellers into our stores to discover the exclusive offer from the world-famous Maison Martell.”

Pernod Ricard Global Travel Retail, EMEA General Manager, Antonio Duvasaid: “We are committed to delivering the finest travel retail experiences for our customers and offering them exclusive products to enhance their journey. The Martell Paris Exclusive Edition fulfils this promise, whilst also signifying a special union of three French companies, proud to celebrate the third Olympic Games to be staged in Paris. We are delighted to launch this edition on the global stage in the sensational setting of Paris Charles De Gaulle’s Terminal 2E; home to some of the world’s leading luxury brands and global icons.”

Tagged with:2024 Paris Olympic GamesLagardère Travel RetailMartellPernod Ricard Global Travel Retail
